reference_answer: Locker Note LK-3 confirmed that locker L-22 was opened by attendant Omar Reyes at 14:05.
The bag tag was verified as BT-18.
The owner's name is unstated for locker L-22.
The locker assignment end date is unstated.
The claim that the bag contained swim goggles is disputed.
The cash claim is unsupported because the note has no cash count, no witness initials, and no deposit receipt.
The hinge photo and authorized key checkout rule out forced entry.
The temporary hold on the locker is provisional until the owner-contact window closes.
The storage-location line was corrected from south cage to north cage.
Owner contact pending replaced the unclaimed-property status.
